overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a foggy, neon-lit Night City at night. The player exits an indoor NCART transit station and navigates crowded elevated walkways with massive skyscrapers, advertisements, and the iconic Orbital Air tower visible through the dense haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit station with vending machines

events.description: approaching the NCART transit doors, preparing to exit the station

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor transit station holding a melee weapon, passing vending machines and advertisements

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying a health warning with a pink graphic
red automated vending machine with glowing product display
metal transit doors with NCART logo and yellow warning stripes
multiple illuminated advertisement screens with cyberpunk graphics

segments.scene_description: The player navigates a dimly lit indoor transit station with concrete floors and pillars. Various vending machines and digital advertisements line the walls, while the player approaches the exit doors leading to the NCART station.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy elevated pedestrian walkway with city views

events.description: exits the indoor transit station into the foggy night environment
moving from artificial indoor light to foggy outdoor neon lighting with street lamps

agents.ego_description: walking along the foggy elevated walkway, observing the cityscape and distant towers

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead on the foggy walkway

entered.detail: large digital billboard showing military imagery and text
tall cylindrical skyscraper with vertical lighting visible through fog
tall street lamps casting yellow-green light through the fog
concrete safety railing along the elevated walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the transit station into a thick foggy night. The environment shifts to an elevated concrete walkway with the massive Orbital Air tower visible in the distance. Street lamps cast eerie green light through the haze as the player walks past a large military advertisement billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded commercial elevated plaza with neon signs

events.description: crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians carrying umbrellas

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate crowds of pedestrians on the wet elevated walkway, passing shops and planters

notable_agents.action: person carrying a glowing purple illuminated umbrella walking ahead

entered.detail: building covered with bright neon signs and advertisements in Japanese and English
concrete planters containing tall grass and tropical plants
low building with multiple large satellite dishes on the roof

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a more crowded section of the elevated walkway, passing pedestrians with umbrellas including one with a distinctive glowing purple canopy. The area features commercial buildings with bright neon signage, planter boxes with vegetation, and the Orbital Air tower now visible to the left through the persistent fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: high elevation highway overlook with city traffic views

events.description: ascending ramps and looking down at traffic moving on streets below
passing under massive building overhang with red warning lights visible above

agents.ego_description: walking along high elevated walkways while looking down at the city traffic and streets below

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with multiple levels and support columns
vehicle traffic visible moving on streets far below the walkway
enormous dark building with rows of red warning lights on the facade
elevated train track structure running parallel to the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player reaches higher elevations with expansive views of the foggy city below. Walking along the edge of a massive highway structure, the camera pans to show traffic moving on distant streets and the imposing architecture of Night City's skyscrapers. The segment ends with views of a massive building featuring red aviation warning lights against the foggy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sterile confines of an indoor transit hub into the sprawling, neon-drenched haze of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within a dimly lit station characterized by concrete pillars and glowing vending machines, moving steadily toward the exit doors. As the camera emerges into the night, the environment shifts to an elevated concrete walkway where eerie green street lamps pierce a thick fog and the massive Orbital Air tower looms in the distance. The scene then expands into a crowded commercial district filled with bright neon signage and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas before ascending further along a massive highway structure. Finally, the perspective opens up to a panoramic view of the foggy city below, panning across distant traffic and imposing skyscrapers topped with red aviation warning lights.
